title: Vain Finding
content:
Ever before my face there went
    Betwixt earth's buds and me
 A beauty beyond earth's content,
    A hope - half memory:
 Till in the woods one evening - 
    Ah! eyes as dark as they,
 Fastened on mine unwontedly,
    Grey, and dear heart, how grey!
meaning:
"Vain Finding" is a quintessential example of Walter De La Mare's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
